description: You are a QA Automation Engineer at a media streaming startup. The CI/CD pipeline is blocked because 5 Playwright E2E tests in the /home/ga/workspace/e2e_testing/tests/ directory are 'flaky'—they randomly fail depending on network latency. A local Express server is running in the background injecting random delays to reproduce the CI environment. Refactor all 5 tests so they pass consistently regardless of network latency, without removing the underlying business logic assertions.
